name: Valley of Dread
weather: Rain that turns dust to red mud
politics: Large predators are the only law.
Hunters enter rarely and never casually.
culture: Chultans speak of the valley with practical fear.
Old bones are left undisturbed unless necessity demands otherwise.
rumours: A beast with scars like white lightning rules the valley.
A hunter left a fortune in a cave and never returned.
Drums are sometimes heard from empty cliffs.
dmSecrets: The apex predator can become a recurring threat.
Bone fields conceal relics and warnings.
A faction may be baiting monsters toward rivals.
